ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_number" INTEGER /* Show number of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the episode */,
  "total_contestants" INTEGER /* Total number of contestants in the episode */,
  "winning_contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning contestant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the question belongs to */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round the question was asked in (e.g., Jeopardy!) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the question belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the question (e.g., $200) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., history, sports, science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contestants" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contestant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contestant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contestant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contestant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contestant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contestant_episode" (
  "contestant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contestant */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the contestant in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contestant_id", "episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_answers" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is correct or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id", "answer")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, researcher, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_episodes, edit_questions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_comments" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id", "user_id", "created_at")
)
column_names: Total number of contestants in the episode

ID of the category the question belongs to
